self.className: drawer__title heading lg:text-3xl text-2xl leading-none tracking-tight

cssRules: .split-words .word { display: inline-flex; line-height: 1; margin: -0.1em -0.05em; overflow: hidden; padding: 0.15em 0.05em; }
.reveal-testimonials blockquote { text-align: unset; padding-block: 0px; display: grid; gap: var(--sp-10); }
.reveal-testimonials .testimonial { padding: var(--sp-6); border-radius: var(--rounded-block); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); }

.reveal-banner__scroller { background-image: ; background-position-x: ; background-position-y: ; background-size: ; background-repeat: ; background-attachment: ; background-origin: ; background-clip: ; background-color: rgb(var(--color-background)); height: 200vh; }
